Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Summit Appliance Repair to get the job done right.

“Saved $1,200 on a new fridge when our 12-year-old Whirlpool died during July heat wave. Technician diagnosed a failed condenser fan that was causing compressor overload - had it running cold in 90 minutes. Even cleaned all the built-up sand from the coils I didn't know was there. Our Lake Nona smart fridge works better than the day we bought it!”

Marianne K. Refrigerator Repair
Jul 18, 2025

“Our vacation rental washer in Kissimmee kept tripping the breaker every third load. Summit identified a failing drain pump motor that was drawing too much current - something three other companies missed. Fixed same-day before our next guests arrived. Now we schedule preventive maintenance with them every six months.”

Carlos R. Washer Repair
May 22, 2025

“As a Winter Park historic homeowner, I was terrified about getting our 1954 Wedgewood stove serviced. Technician arrived with specialty tools and actually improved the original burner performance while preserving the enamel. Took photos of the process for our home records. Temperature is now accurate within 5 degrees - perfect for canning season.”

Bethany W. Oven Repair
Mar 15, 2025

“Our Sub-Zero ice maker died during the August heat wave with three kids home from school. Technician diagnosed a clogged water line from Sanford's hard water and installed an upgraded filtration system. Now makes ice 30% faster and the kids say it tastes 'like store bought'. Same-day service saved our grocery budget - no more bagged ice!”

Darnell T. Ice Maker Repair
Aug 9, 2025

“After two companies told us our 8-year-old Bosch needed replacement, Summit found a mineral-clogged water inlet valve. Technician spent two hours descaling every component with some industrial-strength solution. Dishes come out spotless now - better than when it was new. Even showed me how to maintain it with vinegar rinses for Orlando's hard water.”

Sophia L. Dishwasher Repair
Apr 30, 2025

“Our disposal started leaking after grinding mango pits from our backyard tree. Technician replaced the sink flange with a heavy-duty model and reinforced the plumbing connections. Caught it just before water damage could reach our Baldwin Park home's foundation. Bonus - showed my son how to use the hex wrench reset safely.”

Marcus B. Garbage Disposal Repair
Jun 12, 2025
Summit Appliance Repair

Trusted appliance repair professionals serving Orlando, FL and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
